contract_summary: SCENES.md Main scene for tag v0.1.0: fixed 1280x720 gameplay table UI with green procedural background, AI Left and AI Right panels, bottom cards, center trick/status area, bottom player hand, action bar, and result overlay. ASSETS.md Visual Asset Contract binds all visible gameplay objects to procedural card/UI assets: readable 56x78-ish card faces, clear AI counts and role labels, obvious selected-card lift/highlight, visible active turn/pass/status text, AI recent play/count changes, and prominent result/replay UI.
